If two individuals are needed to provide a service, two visits may be covered. If two 
individuals are present, but only one is needed to provide the care, only one visit may be 
covered. 

A visit is initiated with the delivery of covered home health services and ends at the 
conclusion of delivery of covered home health services. In those circumstances in which 
all reasonable and necessary home health services cannot be provided in the course of a
